_description: Adversarial near-miss test cases. Each query has a correct answer and known decoys (similar-but-wrong results) that should rank below it.

test_cases.query: FastAPI request body validation with Pydantic BaseModel
test_cases.description: Should find actual validation logic, not test fixtures or docs examples

decoys.description: Test file that imports BaseModel for test fixtures
Documentation example that shows BaseModel usage

test_cases.query: HTTP connection timeout handling in HTTPX client
test_cases.description: Should find timeout CONFIG, not timeout ERROR handling in tests

decoys.description: Test for timeout behavior (tests timeout, doesn't implement it)
Exception class for timeout (TimeoutException, not Timeout config)

test_cases.description: Should find the real model_dump, not deprecated .dict() or test usage

decoys.description: Deprecated .dict() method (v1 API)
Test calling model_dump (usage, not implementation)

test_cases.description: Should find WebSocket.accept(), not HTTP endpoint or test

decoys.description: HTTP endpoint that mentions websocket in docstring
Test for WebSocket that calls accept()

test_cases.query: HTTPX AsyncClient.get implementation for making GET requests
test_cases.description: Should find the actual get() method, not sync Client.get or tests

decoys.description: Sync Client.get method (same name, wrong class)
Test using client.get() (call site, not definition)

test_cases.query: Pydantic field_validator decorator for custom validation
test_cases.description: Should find v2 field_validator, not v1 @validator

decoys.description: Deprecated v1 @validator decorator
Comment/docstring explaining migration from validator to field_validator

test_cases.description: Should find the resolver logic, not examples using Depends

decoys.description: Tutorial using Depends in a simple example
Depends class definition (just a container, not the resolver)

test_cases.query: HTTPX request authentication with Bearer token
test_cases.description: Should find auth implementation, not test mocking auth

decoys.description: Test with mocked auth header
Example showing auth parameter usage (not implementation)

test_cases.query: Pydantic ConfigDict for model configuration in v2
test_cases.description: Should find ConfigDict definition, not v1 inner Config class

decoys.description: v1 inner Config class (deprecated pattern)
Comment about Config vs ConfigDict migration

test_cases.query: FastAPI response_model serialization and filtering implementation
test_cases.description: Should find where response_model actually filters output, not where it's declared as param

decoys.description: Route decorator that accepts response_model parameter (declaration, not usage)
Tutorial showing response_model in a simple example
